description: Trigger discrimination for the Phase 4 security-review cluster. Pins first-party SAST/SARIF triage apart from dependency/CI supply-chain triage, raw diff review, and migration review. Includes discrimination against the shipped code-reviewer.

cases.prompt: Triage this SARIF file of CodeQL findings on our own source — separate real issues from noise and rank them.
cases.reason: Triaging static-analysis output on first-party code by reachability and exploitability.

cases.prompt: Our SCA tool lists CVEs in third-party packages — tell me which are exploitable.
cases.reason: Dependency/CVE triage is supply-chain review, not first-party SAST.

cases.prompt: No scanner — just security-review this PR's changes by hand.
cases.reason: Hand review of a diff with no scanner output to triage.

cases.prompt: Review this PR for correctness and quality overall.
cases.reason: General code review, not scanner-output triage.
